lines.text: The patrol comes through here every few days. Everywhere else, I'm… (he gestures at all of himself) …a filing problem. A thing with no form.
Can I stay? Here. By you. I'd keep the weeds off. I'm quiet. Mostly.
Every problem I ever had, I solved by walking away. He can't walk away either — everywhere he goes is somebody else's field. Verbs: sense, grow. Neither one says shelter.
…Growth includes deciding what to grow toward.
